title: Badgers Women hope to end season with a win
description: CRICKET NEWS - The Six Gun Grill Garden...
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - The Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers Women will travel to Bloemfontein this weekend for their last round of matches in the HollywoodBets Cricket South Africa Professional Women’s Competition.


> The Badgers will take on the Knights at the Mangaung Oval, and will be keen to win the bottom-of-the-table clash.


Although the results in both the Pro50 (Saturday) and Pro20 (Sunday) matches are irrelevant, Nicolien Janse van Rensburg and her team will be keen to end their season on a win.

Whatever the results, the Knights will be relegated from the professional league at the end of the season.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
